user.title: Southpool Energy Exchange
user.description: Configure Southpool electricity market data for your region.

data_description.dst_correction: Apply daylight saving transitions (CET/CEST) when parsing timestamps. Disable for fixed UTC+1.
data_description.time_offset: Manual correction applied to every timestamp after timezone conversion. Range: -12 to +12 hours.

init.title: Southpool Options
init.description:
Configure the **{region}** region.

To change the region, remove and re-add the integration.

data_description.dst_correction: Apply daylight saving transitions (CET/CEST) when parsing timestamps. Disable for fixed UTC+1.
data_description.time_offset: Manual correction applied to every timestamp after timezone conversion. Range: -12 to +12 hours.
